uplink.description: Upstream Example 1 (sensor + battery block): permittivity, VWC->soil.moisture, soil.temperature, battery
Synthetic mid-range moist warm soil with battery (flags=3)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. x0=24377 -> VWC 0.24998 m3/m3 -> soil.moisture 24.998%; x1=32953 -> 18.5 C; battery word 3300 -> 3.3 V.

uplink.description: Synthetic battery-only uplink (flags=2, sensor block absent)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. Only the battery sensor bit set; battery word 3050 -> 3.05 V; no soil block emitted.
Synthetic error input; upstream rejects any version != 2 with this message.
